Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class TabDefinition

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.TabDefinition
public class TabDefinition extends SObject

Java class for TabDefinition complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="TabDefinition">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Colors" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Icons" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAvailableInAloha" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAvailableInDesktop" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAvailableInLightning" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAvailableInMobile" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCustom" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MobileUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SobjectName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Url" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
